title: anthupatos #0446
definition:
1) a proconsul
    1a) the emperor Augustus divided the Roman provinces into
        senatorial and imperial. The former were governed by
        proconsuls; the later by legates of the emperor, sometimes
        called propraetors

        senatorial and imperial. The former were governed by
